records.question: Who are the patients diagnosed with SJS born on or after 1942-03-15, admitted with admission +, and whose examinations show lac is -, ana is 16.0, and thrombosis is 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN examination ON patient.id = examination.id
WHERE patient.diagnosis = 'SJS' AND patient.birthday >= '1942-03-15' AND examination.lac = '-' AND examination.ana = 16.0 AND examination.thrombosis = 0 AND patient.admission = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
  AND Patient.Birthday >= '1942-03-15'
  AND Patient.Admission = '+'
  AND Examination.LAC = '-'
  AND Examination.ANA = 16.0
  AND Examination.Thrombosis = 0

records.question: Which patients have laboratory results where the rbc is exactly 4.0, the ua is exactly 4.5, and the un is at least 14.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN laboratory ON patient.id = laboratory.id
WHERE laboratory.rbc = 4.0 AND laboratory.ua = 4.5 AND laboratory.un >= 14.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.RBC = 4.0 AND Laboratory.UA = 4.5 AND Laboratory.UN >= 14.0

records.question: Which female patients born on or after 1951-11-24 and described since 1994-02-19 have laboratory results where wbc is 9.0, ua is 2.1, ra is -, and examinations with rvvt is - and thrombosis at most 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN examination ON patient.id = examination.id
JOIN laboratory ON patient.id = laboratory.id
WHERE laboratory.wbc = 9.0 AND examination.thrombosis <= 0 AND laboratory.ua = 2.1 AND patient.description >= '1994-02-19' AND patient.birthday >= '1951-11-24' AND examination.rvvt = '-' AND patient.sex = 'F' AND laboratory.ra = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.Description >= '1994-02-19'
  AND Patient.Birthday >= '1951-11-24'
  AND Patient.SEX = 'F'
  AND Examination.Thrombosis <= 0
  AND Examination.RVVT = '-'
  AND Laboratory.WBC = 9.0
  AND Laboratory.UA = 2.1
  AND Laboratory.RA = '-'

records.question: Which patients were born exactly on 1969-02-15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
WHERE patient.birthday = '1969-02-15'
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE Birthday = '1969-02-15'

records.question: Who are the female patients born on or before 1948-10-07 with examination diagnosis SLE, lac exactly '-', and laboratory hct exactly 36.3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN examination ON patient.id = examination.id
JOIN laboratory ON patient.id = laboratory.id
WHERE patient.sex = 'F' AND patient.birthday <= '1948-10-07' AND examination.lac = '-' AND laboratory.hct = 36.3 AND examination.diagnosis = 'SLE'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'F'
  AND Patient.Birthday <= '1948-10-07'
  AND Examination.LAC = '-'
  AND Examination.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND Laboratory.HCT = 36.3

records.question: Which patients have recorded examinations and laboratory results with hemoglobin exactly 16.0 and GPT at most 33.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN examination ON patient.id = examination.id
JOIN laboratory ON patient.id = laboratory.id
WHERE laboratory.hgb = 16.0 AND laboratory.gpt <= 33.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.HGB = 16.0 AND Laboratory.GPT <= 33.0

records.question: Which female patients diagnosed with SLE have a description dated 1997-02-03 and were born on or after 1989-08-28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
WHERE patient.sex = 'F' AND patient.diagnosis = 'SLE' AND patient.description = '1997-02-03' AND patient.birthday >= '1989-08-28'
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'F' AND Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND Description = '1997-02-03' AND Birthday >= '1989-08-28'

records.question: Who are the patients born exactly on 1968-12-25 with a diagnosis of PSS?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
WHERE patient.birthday = '1968-12-25' AND patient.diagnosis = 'PSS'
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE Birthday = '1968-12-25' AND Diagnosis = 'PSS'

records.question: Which female patients born on or after 1946-02-19 have admission status '-' and description date exactly on 1997-03-27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
WHERE patient.admission = '-' AND patient.description = '1997-03-27' AND patient.birthday >= '1946-02-19' AND patient.sex = 'F'
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE Admission = '-' AND Description = '1997-03-27' AND Birthday >= '1946-02-19' AND SEX = 'F'

records.question: Which patients have a diagnosis that is exactly RA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patient.id FROM patient
JOIN examination ON patient.id = examination.id
WHERE patient.diagnosis = 'RA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'RA'
GROUP BY Patient.ID
